practice.name: Problem 9 (2014 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: The two legs of a right triangle have lengths $2\sqrt{3}$ and $6$. How long is the altitude to the hypotenuse?

practice.name: Problem 24 (2025 AMC 8)
practice.statement: In trapezoid $ABCD$ with $AB \parallel CD$, angles $B$ and $C$ measure $60^\circ$, and $AB = DC$. The side lengths are all positive integers, and the perimeter of $ABCD$ is 30 units. How many non-congruent trapezoids satisfy all of these conditions? (Refer to AoPS page for diagram.)

practice.name: Problem 15 (2013 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: Two sides of a triangle have lengths $10$ and $15$. The length of the altitude to the third side is the average of the lengths of the altitudes to the two given sides. How long is the third side?

practice.name: Problem 11 (2025 AMC 12A)
practice.statement: The orthocenter of a triangle is the concurrent intersection of the three (possibly extended) altitudes. What is the sum of the coordinates of the orthocenter of the triangle whose vertices are $A(2,31), B(8,27),$ and $C(18,27)$?
